channel.title: Simple Blog
channel.description: A lightweight static blog template built with HTML, CSS, and Markdown posts.

item.title: How to Start a Blog in 2026
item.description: Build your blog with plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript while keeping the design clean and mobile-friendly.

item.title: Design Tips for Better Readability
item.description: Good typography and spacing help readers focus on your ideas instead of getting lost in the page.

item.title: Deploy a Static Blog Quickly
item.description: Publish your blog on GitHub Pages, Netlify, or any static host in minutes.
